description: FlowMatrix-AI org baseline - safe for all repo types

packageRules.description: Conservative automerge: digest/pin updates for language + CI-action managers only. Terraform/Docker/custom (i.e. infra) are excluded so they stay manual. Gated by required ok + gitleaks checks.
Conservative automerge: stable (>=1.0.0) patch updates for language + CI-action managers only. Terraform/Docker/custom excluded; minors/majors stay manual.
